title: Module 3 — Repeating Things
goal: Do something many times with loops.

lessons.title: while Loops
lessons.concept: Repeat while a condition stays true; the danger of infinite loops.

challenge.prompt: Use a while loop to print the numbers 1, 2, 3 — each on its own line.

lessons.title: for Loops and range()
lessons.concept: Loop a fixed number of times with for and range().

challenge.prompt: Use a for loop with range to print 0 1 2 3 4 — each on its own line.

lessons.title: Adding Things Up in a Loop
lessons.concept: Use a running total (accumulator) inside a loop.

challenge.prompt: Use a loop to add up the numbers 1 to 5 and print the total.

lessons.title: break and continue
lessons.concept: Stop a loop early with break; skip an iteration with continue.

challenge.prompt: Loop over 1 to 10. Stop the loop (break) when you reach 5. Print each number before stopping, one per line.
